// about me

Who I Am

Samuel Musungu
Full-Stack Developer

I'm a full-stack developer, creative technologist, and cybersecurity specialist with 3+ years of experience building premium digital solutions. I hold a BSc in Information Technology from Africa Nazarene University and certifications from Huawei (HCIA Cybersecurity) and Cisco Networking Academy.

I founded HighDesign Agency, delivering cinematic web experiences for hospitality and creative industries. I also serve as Technical Lead for EduBridge Kenya — a scholarship platform helping Kenyan students access global education.

Previously interned at Huawei Technologies (Cybersecurity) and Cisco (Network Engineering) — giving me a rare blend of enterprise-level security knowledge and creative development skills.

// what I offer

Services

Full-Stack Development

End-to-end web development using Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS. From landing pages to full web applications.

AI Data & Annotation

Data labeling, prompt evaluation, RLHF feedback, and AI training tasks with high accuracy and attention to guidelines.

Research & Analysis

In-depth web research, competitive analysis, structured reporting, and data-driven summaries for any industry.

Technical Writing

Clear, accurate documentation, content writing, and editorial review for tech products and digital platforms.
